TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Qaboos bin Said al Said ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 11, Qaboos bin Said al Said, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1940) mrhuw Oman ta' misuw hya' ga Qaboos bin Said al Said, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 1970 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: qaő≤oos~…ē ő≤in s~…ēai* al s~…ēai* rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, qaő≤oos~…ē ő≤in s~…ēai* al s~…ēai*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw oman ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a qaő≤oos~…ē ő≤in s~…ēai* al s~…ēai*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Qaboos bin Said al Said ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 11, Qaboos bin Said al Said, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1940) mrhuw Oman ta' misuw hya' ga Qaboos bin Said al Said, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 1970 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
